gestures.label: Hello
gestures.description: Hand wave or touch forehead moving outwards.

gestures.label: Thank You
gestures.description: Fingertips touch chin and move forward toward the receiver.

gestures.label: Please
gestures.description: Flat palm circular motion on the center of the chest.

gestures.label: Sorry
gestures.description: Fist rubbed in a circular motion over the chest.

gestures.label: Good Morning
gestures.description: Sun rising gesture combined with thumbs up or touch chin outwards.

gestures.label: Good Night
gestures.description: Hands coming down together like closing eyelids/curtains.

gestures.label: Yes
gestures.description: Fist with thumb up or closed hand nodding forward.

gestures.label: No
gestures.description: Index and middle finger tapping thumb shut.

gestures.label: Stop
gestures.description: Open palm extended forward firmly facing outward.

gestures.label: Come
gestures.description: Index finger beckoning inward toward chest.

gestures.label: Go
gestures.description: Hand sweeping away from the body.

gestures.label: Help
gestures.description: Closed fist resting on flat open palm raised upward.

gestures.label: Emergency
gestures.description: E-handshape waving rapidly side to side or above head.

gestures.label: Doctor
gestures.description: Fingers tapping the pulse point on opposite wrist.

gestures.label: Hospital
gestures.description: Drawing a cross shape on upper arm with two fingers.

gestures.label: Water
gestures.description: W-handshape touching the lips or chin.

gestures.label: Food
gestures.description: Bunty fingertips repeatedly tapping mouth.

gestures.label: Family
gestures.description: F-handshapes circling together to meet in front.

gestures.label: School
gestures.description: Clapping hands horizontally like opening/closing a book.

gestures.label: Name
gestures.description: Index and middle fingers of both hands tapping across.

gestures.label: How are you?
gestures.description: Both hands chest level opening upward questioning.

gestures.label: I am fine
gestures.description: Open 5-handshape tapping center of chest proudly.

gestures.label: Mother
gestures.description: Thumb of open hand touching the chin.

gestures.label: Father
gestures.description: Thumb of open hand touching the forehead.

gestures.label: Friend
gestures.description: Index fingers hooking together back and forth.

gestures.label: Where
gestures.description: Index finger wagging side to side questioning.

gestures.label: When
gestures.description: Index finger circling and touching opposite index tip.

gestures.label: Why
gestures.description: Hand moving from forehead into Y-handshape.

gestures.label: What
gestures.description: Open palms facing upward shaking gently.

gestures.label: Who
gestures.description: Index finger circling around lips or chin.

gestures.label: A
gestures.description: Fist with thumb resting on side of index finger.

gestures.label: B
gestures.description: Flat palm fingers together with thumb tucked across palm.

gestures.label: C
gestures.description: Curved hand forming a C shape.

gestures.label: D
gestures.description: Index finger up with thumb and other fingers forming a circle.

gestures.label: E
gestures.description: Fingertips curled down touching thumb.

gestures.label: F
gestures.description: Index and thumb touching circle while other 3 fingers extended up.

gestures.label: G
gestures.description: Index finger and thumb pointing sideways horizontally.

gestures.label: H
gestures.description: Index and middle finger pointing sideways horizontally.

gestures.label: I
gestures.description: Pinky finger pointed straight up with fist closed.

gestures.label: L
gestures.description: Thumb and index finger extended at right angle forming L.

gestures.label: M
gestures.description: Three fingers tucked over thumb.

gestures.label: N
gestures.description: Two fingers tucked over thumb.

gestures.label: O
gestures.description: Fingers and thumb touching forming an O circle.

gestures.label: P
gestures.description: Downward pointing K-handshape.

gestures.label: R
gestures.description: Index and middle fingers crossed.

gestures.label: S
gestures.description: Closed fist with thumb wrapped over front fingers.

gestures.label: T
gestures.description: Thumb tucked between index and middle finger.

gestures.label: U
gestures.description: Index and middle fingers extended upward and touching.

gestures.label: V
gestures.description: Index and middle fingers extended upward forming a V split.

gestures.label: W
gestures.description: Index, middle, and ring fingers extended upward forming W.

gestures.label: Y
gestures.description: Thumb and pinky extended out with fist closed (Hang loose).
Closed O circle shape.
Index finger raised up.
Index and middle fingers raised up.
Thumb, index, and middle fingers extended.
Four fingers extended with thumb tucked across palm.
All five fingers spread open upward.
